'''Aaghra''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Zug]] in the [[Zug system/Legends|Zug system]],<ref name="Aargau Part 1" /> which was located in the [[Arrowhead]], the intersection of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was a [[Moon/Legends|moonless]] world of [[Magma/Legends|molten rock]].<ref name="Aargau Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aaghra was first mentioned briefly in "Three Simple Laws," the first part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on the [[Wizards.com]] website in [[2003]].<ref name="Aargau Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zug [[Star system/Legends|system]], thereby including Aaghra, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
